Title: Instrument UX baseline events
Description: Capture baseline events for login SSO induction and admin navigation usage
Acceptance Criteria: Event taxonomy implemented; PII-safe payloads only; Baseline funnel report generated
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web lint; npm run -w apps/web typecheck; npm run -w apps/web test; npm run -w apps/web test:integration; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e:smoke; npm run guardrails-lint && npm run guardrails-tests && npm run policy-check

Title: Top-20 route heuristic audit
Description: Audit highest-traffic routes and rank UX issues by severity and effort
Acceptance Criteria: Top 20 routes audited; Severity-ranked issue list published; Screenshot evidence linked
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test:visual

Title: Rollout flags and kill-switch map
Description: Define feature flag controls for each sprint deliverable with rollback mapping
Acceptance Criteria: Flags created with safe defaults; Kill-switch runbook updated; Invalid flags fail safe
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web lint; npm run -w apps/web typecheck; npm run guardrails-lint && npm run guardrails-tests && npm run policy-check

Title: Token-first migration for admin surfaces
Description: Replace legacy one-off admin styling with shared tokenized classes
Acceptance Criteria: bg-white usage reduced by >=90 percent; Shared primitives used for controls and surfaces; No contrast regression in both themes
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web lint; npm run -w apps/web typecheck; npm run -w apps/web test; npm run -w apps/web test:visual

Title: Auth and public shell visual refresh
Description: Unify visual language between auth and public sign-in shell across desktop and mobile
Acceptance Criteria: Auth and public shells use same brand primitives; Mobile and desktop snapshots approved; Reduced motion preserved
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test:e2e:stable:mobile-chrome; npm run -w apps/web test:visual

Title: High-traffic page hierarchy standardization
Description: Apply consistent page hierarchy pattern to dashboard sites and live register
Acceptance Criteria: Context label headline primary action and status summary pattern applied; Typography spacing follows tokens; Visual baseline updated
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test:visual; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e:smoke

Title: Split login intent Password vs SSO
Description: Reduce login cognitive load by letting users choose auth path before fields render
Acceptance Criteria: Two clear entry options shown first; Only relevant fields shown per mode; Existing auth and redirect security unchanged
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e -- e2e/admin-auth.spec.ts

Title: Unified loading empty error states
Description: Create shared async page-state components and adopt on top admin routes
Acceptance Criteria: Shared components implemented; Top 10 admin routes migrated; Error states remain deterministic and non-sensitive
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e:smoke

Title: Reduce admin IA cognitive load
Description: Reorganize visible admin navigation with progressive disclosure and search-first fallback
Acceptance Criteria: Visible top-level labels <=22 from baseline 35; Command palette still complete and role-aware; Keyboard nav retained
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e -- e2e/command-mode.spec.ts

Title: Mobile-first admin navigation shell
Description: Redesign mobile admin shell for quick task switching and clear location context
Acceptance Criteria: Core tasks reachable in <=2 taps; Current route context always visible; Mobile focus order passes accessibility checks
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test:e2e:stable:mobile-chrome; npm run -w apps/web test:visual

Title: Sites page mobile card workflow
Description: Convert mobile sites list to card workflow with visible state and actions
Acceptance Criteria: No horizontal scan needed at 390px; Primary actions remain easy to hit; Mobile visual baseline approved
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test:visual; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e:stable:mobile-chrome

Title: Live register mobile density and filters
Description: Improve mobile scanability and filtering speed for live occupancy operations
Acceptance Criteria: Compact scannable rows or cards shipped; Sticky filters available; High-risk indicators remain prominent
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test:e2e -- e2e/logic-flow.spec.ts; npm run -w apps/web test:visual

Title: Embed copilot in hazards incidents permits
Description: Place AI guidance in-context within operational workflows instead of isolated screen
Acceptance Criteria: In-context suggestion panel available; Suggestions are draft-only; Tenant scoping enforced for requests and responses
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test; npm run -w apps/web test:integration; npm run guardrails-tests

Title: Explainability and approval controls for AI
Description: Require explainable AI outputs and explicit human approval for state-changing use
Acceptance Criteria: Each suggestion includes source signals and confidence; Human approval required before apply; Deterministic control IDs on denial
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test -- src/app/admin/safety-copilot/actions.test.ts; npm run guardrails-tests

Title: AI adoption and quality telemetry
Description: Measure accept reject edit outcomes for AI suggestions and expose weekly readout
Acceptance Criteria: Accept reject edit events logged; Weekly adoption report generated; Sensitive text excluded from logs and exports
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test; node tools/test-gap-matrix.mjs

Title: Expand accessibility automation to top 20 routes
Description: Scale axe-playwright checks across highest-value public and admin paths
Acceptance Criteria: Top 20 routes covered by automated checks; Stable deterministic output in CI lane; Serious and critical failures block merges
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test:e2e -- e2e/a11y.spec.ts; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e:stable

Title: WCAG 2.2 remediation pass
Description: Resolve severe contrast focus and form semantics defects found in audits and tests
Acceptance Criteria: All severe findings closed; Focus indicators visible in all themes; Labels and errors correctly associated
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web test; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e -- e2e/a11y.spec.ts

Title: Performance budget and key-route remediation
Description: Set and enforce page performance budgets and fix key route bottlenecks
Acceptance Criteria: Budgets documented for key routes; Login sites live-register induction optimized; Budget report generated in CI
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web build; npm run -w apps/web test:e2e:smoke

Title: Progressive rollout and rollback playbook
Description: Execute staged release by feature flag and verify rollback behavior for each increment
Acceptance Criteria: Pilot-first rollout completed; Rollback steps tested and documented; Budget-protect and entitlements unaffected
Verification Commands: npm run parity-gate; npm run guardrails-lint && npm run guardrails-tests && npm run policy-check

Title: Post-release KPI readout vs baseline
Description: Produce final KPI comparison and decision outcome against defined thresholds
Acceptance Criteria: Baseline vs post-release deltas published; Pass fail decision explicit per KPI; Follow-up backlog created for misses
Verification Commands: node tools/test-confidence-gate.mjs --full

Title: Final docs and demo evidence refresh
Description: Update UX docs checklists and demo evidence pack to match shipped experience
Acceptance Criteria: Docs commands and routes are current; Manual validation checklist updated; Demo evidence package complete
Verification Commands: npm run -w apps/web lint; npm run -w apps/web typecheck; node tools/manual-flow-verify.mjs
